home.heroSubtitle: ONE-STOP AUTO ACCESSORIES SUPPLIER FROM CHINA
home.heroDescription: Your trusted sourcing partner for 500+ automotive accessories across interior, electronics, lighting, exterior, and functional categories — one supplier, complete coverage, reliable delivery to 30+ countries.
home.whyHeading: Your Reliable Sourcing Partner in China
home.whySubtitle: We simplify your supply chain with professional sourcing, quality control, and logistics support — so you can focus on growing your business.
home.whySelectionDesc: Comprehensive range of automotive accessories across 6 major categories and 49 product series. One supplier for all your sourcing needs.
home.whySupplyDesc: Long-term cooperation with specialized factories ensures consistent product availability, stable quality, and reliable lead times for bulk orders.
home.whyMOQDesc: Low minimum order quantities for trial orders and new clients. We grow with your business and scale up as your demand increases.
home.whyOEMDesc: Custom logo, packaging design, and product specification adjustments. We help build your brand with tailored solutions for your market.
home.whyQualityDesc: Every shipment undergoes pre-delivery inspection including material checks, function testing, and packaging verification before dispatch.
home.whyShippingDesc: Reliable logistics partners for sea, air, and express shipping. We handle documentation, customs clearance, and door-to-door delivery worldwide.
home.oemDescription: Stand out in your market with customized products. We handle the sourcing, quality control, and logistics — you get products with your brand identity.
home.oemItem1Desc: Add your brand logo to products and packaging. We coordinate with factories for precise branding execution.
home.oemItem2Desc: Design your own packaging — from simple branded boxes to premium retail-ready packaging with your artwork.
home.oemItem3Desc: Adjust materials, colors, sizes, and features to match your specific market requirements and price points.
home.oemItem4Desc: Sell products under your own brand name. We source the products, you own the brand identity completely.
home.oemItem5Desc: Order samples before bulk production to evaluate quality, packaging, and specifications firsthand.
home.oemItem6Desc: Third-party inspection available for every order. Detailed QC reports and photos before shipment.
home.processSubtitle: From inquiry to delivery, we make B2B sourcing straightforward and transparent. Here's how we work with you.
home.step1Desc: Tell us what you need — product details, quantity, target price, and any special requirements. We respond within 24 hours.
home.step2Desc: We provide product recommendations, pricing, and samples for your evaluation. Confirm specifications before production.
home.step3Desc: Finalize product details, packaging, and delivery timeline. We issue a proforma invoice and begin production coordination.
home.step4Desc: Pre-shipment inspection for every order. We check quantity, quality, packaging, and provide detailed QC documentation.
home.step5Desc: Professional packaging and shipping via sea, air, or express. We handle all logistics and customs documentation.
home.aboutDescription: RICO focuses on supplying quality automotive accessories for wholesalers, retailers, e-commerce sellers, and global distributors. We cooperate with experienced factories to provide stable product supply, competitive pricing, and flexible solutions.
home.faqQ1: What is your minimum order quantity (MOQ)?
home.faqA1: MOQ varies by product series, typically starting from 50–100 pieces per SKU. We offer flexible MOQ for trial orders and new clients — contact us to discuss your specific requirements.
home.faqQ2: Do you offer OEM and private label services?
home.faqA2: Yes. We provide custom logo printing, branded packaging, product customization, and complete private label solutions. Our team handles the entire process from design to delivery.
home.faqQ3: How do you ensure product quality?
home.faqA3: We work with audited factories and conduct pre-shipment inspection for every order. This includes function testing, visual inspection, packaging check, and detailed QC reports with photos.
home.faqQ4: What are your shipping methods and delivery times?
home.faqA4: We offer sea freight (most economical, 25–35 days), air freight (faster, 7–10 days), and express courier (fastest, 3–7 days). We handle all shipping documentation and customs clearance.
home.faqQ5: Can I get samples before placing a bulk order?
home.faqA5: Yes, sample orders are welcome. We can provide existing stock samples or produce custom samples per your specifications. Sample costs are typically refundable against your first bulk order.
home.ctaDescription: Whether you need 50 pieces or 50,000 — we're here to help. Contact us today for product recommendations, pricing, and partnership.

about.aboutSubtitle: Your Trusted Sourcing Partner in China — connecting global buyers with quality automotive accessories.
about.aboutHeading: Your Trusted Sourcing Partner in China
about.aboutDescription1: Rico Car Accessories is a professional automotive accessories sourcing partner based in Guangzhou, China. We are not a manufacturer — we are your dedicated sourcing team on the ground, working with a carefully vetted network of specialized factories across China to supply quality products at competitive prices.
about.aboutDescription2: With deep knowledge of China's automotive accessories supply chain, we help wholesalers, retailers, e-commerce sellers, and distributors source the right products, ensure consistent quality, and manage export logistics — so you can focus on growing your business in your market.
about.whatWeDoSourcingDesc: We find and match the right products from our network of 50+ specialized factories. From popular items to niche requirements, we source across 6 major categories and 49 product series.
about.whatWeDoSupplyChainDesc: We manage the entire supply chain — factory coordination, production tracking, timeline management, and inventory planning. One point of contact for your complete sourcing needs.
about.whatWeDoQCDesc: Pre-shipment inspection for every order. We check materials, functionality, packaging, and compliance. Detailed QC reports with photos provide full transparency before your goods ship.
about.whatWeDoExportDesc: Complete export handling including documentation, customs clearance, and international shipping. Sea freight, air freight, or express — we optimize for cost and delivery speed.
about.whatWeDoOEMDesc: Custom branding, logo printing, packaging design, and product modification. We help you build your brand with tailored solutions and professional execution.
about.whatWeDoSupportDesc: Multilingual team providing responsive communication before, during, and after your order. We speak your language and understand your market requirements.
about.whyChinaDesc: We are on the ground in Guangzhou, China's automotive accessories hub. Direct access to factories, real-time market knowledge, and face-to-face supplier relationships give you a competitive edge.
about.whyPartnersDesc: We work exclusively with audited, experienced factories. Every partner undergoes quality system review, production capacity assessment, and export compliance verification before joining our network.
about.whyServiceDesc: From product search to final delivery — we handle everything. You get a single, reliable partner managing sourcing, quality, logistics, and documentation.
about.whyFlexibleDesc: Low MOQ for trial orders, flexible payment terms, and scalable supply as your business grows. We adapt to your needs, not the other way around.
about.whyQualityDesc: Systematic pre-shipment inspection for every order. Material verification, function testing, packaging check, and detailed QC reports — nothing ships without our approval.
about.whyExportDesc: Serving clients in 30+ countries across Middle East, Africa, South America, Southeast Asia, and Europe. We understand regional standards, preferences, and documentation requirements.
about.processSubtitle: A proven 5-step approach that takes the complexity out of sourcing from China. Transparent, reliable, and tailored to your business needs.
about.processStep1Desc: Share your product needs, target market, quantity, and budget. We analyze your requirements and propose the best sourcing strategy for your business.
about.processStep2Desc: We search our factory network for the best matches — comparing quality, pricing, production capacity, and lead times to recommend optimal suppliers.
about.processStep3Desc: Review product samples, packaging options, and specifications. We facilitate revisions until everything meets your standards before production begins.
about.processStep4Desc: We monitor production progress and conduct pre-shipment inspection. Quality, quantity, packaging — verified with detailed reports and photos.
about.processStep5Desc: Professional export handling, documentation, and shipping. We coordinate logistics and provide tracking until your goods arrive safely.
about.oemHeading: Build Your Brand With Our Support
about.oemDescription: Create differentiated products for your market. We manage the sourcing and production — you focus on brand building and sales.
about.oemItem1Desc: Your logo on products, packaging, and manuals. We coordinate precise brand execution with our manufacturing partners.
about.oemItem2Desc: Design packaging that sells — from simple branded boxes to premium retail-ready packaging with full-color artwork.
about.oemItem3Desc: Specify materials, colors, sizes, and features to match your market. We source exactly what your customers want.
about.oemItem4Desc: Complete private label service — you define the product and brand identity, we handle the entire sourcing and supply process.
about.ctaDescription: Whether you're launching a new product line or optimizing your existing supply chain — our team is ready to help. Contact us to discuss your requirements.
